name: Syrah Resources Limited
analysis: SYR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 74% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.1400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1400, stop A$0.0960, target A$0.2400 (2.27:1) — then trail it.
